# feat(kaizen-observability): add AgentDiagnostics context manager

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `6884d829e0b4` — feat(kaizen-observability): add AgentDiagnostics context manager

**Body**:

AgentDiagnostics satisfies Diagnostic Protocol; wraps TraceExporter
so every TraceEvent is routed to the durable sink AND retained for
rollup. report() surfaces counts by event_type, total cost
(microdollars, not float dollars per CostTracker alignment),
p50/p95 duration, and error_rate. Pure math — no LLM reasoning.

PR#6 of issue #567.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
